section.heading: Deposit of remainder of excess amount into Treasury as indirect restitution

content.p: The amount that remains from the excess amount described in section 4502(c) 11 See References in Text note below. of this title after all disbursements have been made for a fiscal year under section 4502(d) 1 of this title shall be deposited by the Secretary of the Treasury into the general fund of the Treasury.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 4502(c) and (d) of this title, referred to in text, was repealed by section 4502(e) of this title.
